Containers.Name: Checkmk 2.2.0
Containers.Description: Deprecated, please use the newer version (>= 2.3.0) of this plugin. This version will be removed in the future. https://forums.unraid.net/profile/266669-donimax/ https://raw.githubusercontent.com/donimax/unraid-docker-templates/master/donimax/images/checkmk.png
